name: Deriv Digit Bot
description: Plain JavaScript Deriv Digit Over/Under bot with a realtime dashboard.

DERIV_API_TOKEN.description: Deriv authorization token with trade scope.

DERIV_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Optional Deriv account ID to pin a specific demo or real account.

DEFAULT_MODE.description: Default account mode shown when the dashboard opens.

DERIV_APP_ID.description: App ID from a PAT application you registered on developers.deriv.com.

DASHBOARD_PASSWORD.description: Basic-auth password for the dashboard. Set this before exposing the app publicly.

BASE_STAKE_PERCENT.description: Growth mode stake as a fraction of session balance.

RISKY_STAKE_PERCENT.description: Risky jump stake as a fraction of session balance.

MARTINGALE_CAP_PERCENT.description: Maximum martingale stake as a fraction of remaining balance.

WINDOW_SIZE.description: Digits to track when comparing Over 1 and Under 8 frequency.

GUIDE_FILTERS.description: Enable the extra entry filters from the strategy notes.

STRICT_BAR_FILTERS.description: Enable the stricter bar filters for entries.
